subject: Chemistry
question_text:
At constant temperature and volume, X decomposes as 2X(g) $$\to$$ 3Y(g)  + 2Z(g); Px is the partial pressure of X.

subject: Chemistry
question_text: Find the velocity (ms-1) of electron in first Bohr's  orbit of radius a0. Also find the de Broglie's wavelength (in m). Find the orbital angular momentum of 2p orbital of hydrogen atom in units of $$h/2 \pi$$.

subject: Mathematics
Mathematics
micro_topic: Scalar Or Dot Product Of Two Vectors And Its Applications
question_text: If the incident ray on a surface is along the unit vector $$\widehat v\,\,,$$ the reflected ray is along the unit vector $$\widehat w\,\,$$ and the normal is along unit vector $$\widehat a\,\,$$ outwards. Express $$\widehat w\,\,$$  in terms of $$\widehat a\,\,$$ and $$\widehat v\,\,.$$

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Find the equation of the plane containing the line $$2x-y+z-3=0,3x+y+z=5$$ and at a distance of $${1 \over {\sqrt 6 }}$$ from the point $$(2, 1, -1).$$

subject: Mathematics
question_text: A person goes to office either by car, scooter, bus or train, the probability of which being $${1 \over 7},{3 \over 7},{2 \over 7}$$ and $${1 \over 7}$$ respectively.  Probability that he reaches office late, if he takes car, scooter, bus or train is $${2 \over 9},{1 \over 9},{4 \over 9}$$ and $${1 \over 9}$$ respectively. Given that he reached office in time, then what is the probability that he travelled by a car.

subject: Mathematics
micro_topic: Solution Of Differential Equations By Method Of Separation Variables And Homogeneous
question_text: If length of tangent at any point on the curve $$y=f(x)$$ intecepted between the point and the $$x$$-axis is length $$1.$$ Find the equation of the curve.

subject: Mathematics
question_text:
$$f(x)$$ is a differentiable function and $$g(x)$$ is a double differentiable
 function such that $$\left| {f\left( x \right)} \right| \le 1$$ and $$f'(x)=g(x).$$ 
If $${f^2}\left( 0 \right) + {g^2}\left( 0 \right) = 9.$$ Prove that there exists some $$c \in \left( { - 3,3} \right)$$ 
such that $$g(c).g''(c)<0.$$

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Evaluate $$\,\int\limits_0^\pi  {{e^{\left| {\cos x} \right|}}} \left( {2\sin \left( {{1 \over 2}\cos x} \right) + 3\cos \left( {{1 \over 2}\cos x} \right)} \right)\sin x\,\,dx$$

subject: Mathematics
micro_topic: Applications Of Complex Numbers In Coordinate Geometry
question_text: If one the vertices of the square circumscribing the circle $$\left| {z - 1} \right| = \sqrt 2 \,is\,2 + \sqrt {3\,} \,i$$. Find the other vertices of the square.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Find the area bounded by the curves $${x^2} = y,{x^2} =  - y$$ and $${y^2} = 4x - 3.$$

subject: Mathematics
question_text: If $$p(x)$$ be a polynomial of degree $$3$$ satisfying $$p(-1)=10, p(1)=-6$$ and $$p(x)$$ has maxima at $$x=-1$$ and $$p'(x)$$ has minima at $$x=1$$. Find the distance between the local maxima and local minima of the curve.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: If  $$\left| {f\left( {{x_1}} \right) - f\left( {{x_2}} \right)} \right| < {\left( {{x_1} - {x_2}} \right)^2},$$ for all $${x_1},{x_2} \in R$$. Find the equation of tangent to the cuve $$y = f\left( x \right)$$ at the point $$(1, 2)$$.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Tangents are drawn from any point on the hyperbola $${{{x^2}} \over 9} - {{{y^2}} \over 4} = 1$$ to the circle $${x^2} + {y^2} = 9$$.Find the locus of mid-point of the chord of contact.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Find the equation of the common tangent in $${1^{st}}$$ quadrant to the circle $${x^2} + {y^2} = 16$$ and the ellipse $${{{x^2}} \over {25}} + {{{y^2}} \over 4} = 1$$. Also find the length of the intercept of the tangent between the coordinate axes.

subject: Mathematics
topic: Straight Lines And Pair Of Straight Lines
question_text: The area of the triangle formed by intersection of a line parallel to $$x$$-axis and passing through $$P (h, k)$$ with the lines $$y = x $$ and $$x + y = 2$$ is $$4{h^2}$$. Find the locus of the point $$P$$.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Circles with radii 3, 4 and 5 touch each other externally. It P is the point of intersection of tangents to these circles at their points of contact, find the distance of P from the points of contact.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: If total number of runs scored in n matches is $$\left( {{{n + 1} \over 4}} \right)\,\,({2^{n + 1}} - n - 2)\,$$ where $$n > 1$$, and the runs scored in the $${k^{th}}$$ match are given by k. $$\,{2^{n + 1 - k}}$$, where $$1 \le k \le n$$. Find n.

subject: Mathematics
question_text: Find the range of values of $$\,t$$ for which $$$2\,\sin \,t = {{1 - 2x + 5{x^2}} \over {3{x^2} - 2x - 1}},\,\,\,\,\,t\, \in \,\left[ { - {\pi  \over 2},\,{\pi  \over 2}} \right].$$$

subject: Physics
question_text:
The side of a cube is measured by vernier callipers (10 divisions of a vernier scale coincide with
9 divisions of main scale, where 1 division of main scale is 1 mm). The main scale reads 10 mm and
first division of vernier scale coincides with the main scale. Mass of the cube is 2.736 g. Find the
density of the cube in appropriate significant figures.
